channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Transport groups launch nationwide strike, demand fare hike and fuel price reduction
item.description: Naglunsad ng panibagong nationwide strike ang mga driver at operator ng public utility vehicles (PUVs) bilang protesta laban sa patuloy na mataas na presyo ng krudo. Pinangunahan ito ng mga transport ...

item.title: Ghani Khan Choudhury legacy shapes high-stakes electoral battle in Malda ahead of 2026 polls
item.description: The political landscape of Malda in West Bengal is once again being strongly influenced by the enduring legacy of late Congress leader ABA Ghani Khan Choudhury, popularly referred to through the ‘Bark...

item.title: Government and Teachers' Unions Engage on Reforms to Improve Healthcare Services Under SHA
item.description: The Kenyan government has reiterated its commitment to improving healthcare access for teachers through reforms under the Social Health Authority (SHA). In a consultative forum held in Kisumu, the Pri...

item.title: Fatal workplace accident involving forklift at south-east Queensland quarry
item.description: A worker has died following a serious workplace incident involving a forklift at a quarry in south-east Queensland. Emergency services were called to the site after reports of a major accident, but th...

item.title: Keir Starmer defends appointment process amid Peter Mandelson vetting controversy
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer faced significant political pressure in the House of Commons after revelations emerged regarding the appointment of Peter Mandelson as the British envoy to the Unit...

item.title: Union League increases prize money with Sh150 million for champions and Sh100 million for runners-up
item.description: The Union League has received a major financial upgrade ahead of the new season, with organisers significantly increasing the prize money in a move aimed at boosting competition intensity and the tour...

item.title: Pioneering South African beauty queen and actress Cynthia Shange dies aged 76
item.description: Cynthia Shange, a pioneering figure in South Africa’s entertainment and pageantry history, has died at the age of 76 after a period of illness. Her family confirmed that she passed away in the early h...

item.title: Ontario man Kenneth Law expected to plead guilty to aiding and counselling suicide in toxic substance case
item.description: Kenneth Law, an Ontario man accused of running websites that sold lethal substances including sodium nitrite, is expected to plead guilty in May 2026 to 14 counts of counselling or aiding suicide. Cro...

item.title: KRA introduces PIN without filing obligation, ending mandatory Nil Returns for non-earning taxpayers
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) has announced a major change in its tax compliance system by scrapping the requirement for mandatory Nil Returns and introducing a new category known as the 'PIN with...

item.title: Starmer faces renewed pressure over Mandelson appointment amid vetting and Epstein–related scrutiny
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer is coming under fresh political pressure over the appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson as UK ambassador to the United States, with renewed focus on security‑vetting fail...

item.title: MWAN Lagos celebrates senior members and calls for stronger mentorship and work-life balance for women doctors
item.description: The Medical Women’s Association of Nigeria (MWAN), Lagos State chapter, recently organised an event to honour its elderly members and past leaders while also highlighting the importance of mentorship ...

item.title: Ruto’s Italy Visit Aims to Boost Trade, Investment, and Bilateral Cooperation
item.description: President William Ruto is set to travel to Italy for a three-day State visit aimed at strengthening ties between Kenya and Italy. During the visit, he is expected to hold bilateral talks with Italian ...

item.title: LPG prices to drop by P3.36 per kg starting April 21 due to lower transport costs
item.description: Consumers in the Philippines can expect another reduction in liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) prices starting Tuesday, April 21, 2026. According to an advisory from LPG supplier Solane, prices will go do...

item.title: Supreme Court Directs NCLAT to Determine Supertech Project Oversight
item.description: The Supreme Court, in a recent hearing, has passed the buck – so to speak – to the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) regarding the monitoring of Supertech Limited's projects. The whole k...

item.title: Body of Kitale nurse Esther Sitienei repatriated from UK for burial in Kenya
item.description: The body of Esther Sitienei, a Kenyan nurse originally from Kitale who passed away in the United Kingdom, has been repatriated back to Kenya for burial. Esther died on April 4 after bravely battling c...

item.title: Chiral phonons enable magnet-free control of electron orbital motion
item.description: Researchers have demonstrated a new way to control electrons without relying on magnets, potentially opening a path toward more efficient computing technologies. The breakthrough centers on a concept ...

item.title: CM Maryam Approves Multiple Tourism Projects in Murree Including Sky Glass Bridge
item.description: Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz Sharif has approved Punjab’s first sky glass bridge project in tehsil Kotli Sattian, district Murree, to boost tourism in the area. This decision came during a special meet...

item.title: Webpage placeholder and navigation content related to TikTok section
item.description: The provided content does not contain a substantive news article but instead appears to be a fragmented webpage or template page from a media site. It includes a heading referencing TikTok with placeh...

item.title: The political and cultural evolution of the melthundu in Tamil Nadu
item.description: The melthundu, a simple shoulder cloth traditional to Tamil culture, has evolved into a powerful symbol of identity, dignity, and political expression in Tamil Nadu. Originally a basic gesture of resp...

item.title: Apapa Terminal Introduces Alcohol Testing After Detecting Impaired Truck Drivers
item.description: For Apapa Port, APM Terminals together with Nigerian Ports Authority (NPA) don discover say three truck drivers dey operate under influence of alcohol after dem carry out breathalyser tests on 30 driv...
